text:
Once upon an autumn afternoon, there lived a wise old squirrel named Rocky. Rocky had climbed every oak tree in Whispering Woods and knew everything there was to know about nuts.

One day, while munching on an acorn, Rocky met Sammy Star Nose. Sammy had such starry noses! Not just any starry nose—they glittered with all the constellations.

Sammy told Rocky tales of adventure. "I once climbed Mt. Celestia!" Sammy proclaimed excitedly. Rocky listened intently.

"But that's not all," Sammy continued. "I discovered a secret garden. There were flowers blooming with rainbow petals!"

"Oh?" asked Rocky curiously.

"Yes!" Sammy leaned closer. "Every rose tasted sweeter."

And so, together, Sammy and Rocky went on quests. They found rainbow rose bushes. Sammy stole one for bedtime stories, singing songs about adventures with stars as his chorus.

Sometimes Sammy had mischievous adventures alone. One twilight he chased shadows till daylight.
